title: Lead Investment Banker at BSR & Co

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at BSR & Co
jsonLd.description:
BSR & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSR & Co:
BSR & Co is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
